title: French DTS Collectors Editon
wikitext:
[]: French DTS Collectors Editon             Quote Post by AimuKopfsalat » Wed Feb 22, 2017 2:39 pm So um hi, it's my first Post here, and I just wanna ask a questionsabout the French DTS Collectors Editon that I got for myself. It's from Dybex and it's in 16:9 anamorph. It has 3 DVDs one is Death (True2), End of Eva and a Bonus Disc with the Movie Commercials. Is there any difference between this Release and the Japanese Release?

[]: Re: French DTS Collectors Editon             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Feb 27, 2017 8:13 am I bought the non-DTS version from Japan, but looking up the DTS version it appears as though it's only a 2-disc set , with the film and trailers for Death & Rebirth on Disc 1 and the film and trailers for The End of Evangelion on Disc 2. (Both the DTS and non-DTS versions of the Feature Films from Japan are available in only the 2-disc set, unless you want to bundle it up with the rest of the TV series , also available on Blu-ray .) It looks like the only difference between the Japanese and the Dybex release (besides subs and dubs) might be that Dybex set aside a whole separate disc for the trailers.

[]: Re: French DTS Collectors Editon             Quote Post by AimuKopfsalat » Wed Mar 01, 2017 3:36 pm The funny thing is, that the Dybex release has NO Dub of EoE and Death(true2) only subs.
